metadata.successDescription: Your digital product is now available in your Library

verifying.title: Processing Payment...
verifying.body: Your payment is being confirmed. This usually takes just a few seconds.

completed.title: Purchase Successful!
completed.productBodyWithName: {name} is now available in your Library.
completed.productBodyFallback: Your product is now available in your Library.

timeout.title: Payment Received!
timeout.body: Your product will appear in your Library shortly. Please check your Library.

success.policyNotice: All sales are final. Digital products cannot be returned once purchased.

cancel.title: Purchase Canceled
cancel.body: No payment was processed. You can come back anytime.
